scripts.backend: if ss -ltn | awk '{print $4}' | grep -qE '(^|:)(8000)$'; then echo 'Backend already running on http://127.0.0.1:8000'; else source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; fi
scripts.frontend: if ss -ltn | awk '{print $4}' | grep -qE '(^|:)(3000)$'; then echo 'Frontend already running on http://127.0.0.1:3000'; else cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000; fi
